text_blocks.text: through either an informal or formal approach to
learning, including a course of study and lesson plan
that teaches skills, knowledge and/or thinking skills.
Different ways to teach are often referred to as
pedagogy. When deciding what teaching method to
knowledge, environment, and their learning goals as
well as standardized curricula as determined by the
relevant authority. Many times, teachers assist in
learning outside of the classroom by accompanying
students on field trips. The increasing use of
technology, specifically the rise of the internet over
the past decade, has begun to shape the way
teachers approach their roles in the classroom.
